overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dense forest at night in a video game environment. The scene is illuminated by a flashlight as the player moves steadily along a narrow dirt path surrounded by trees and underbrush, creating an atmospheric survival-horror ambiance.

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along a narrow dirt path through dense forest at night, illuminated by a flashlight beam

entered.detail: large tree trunk with rough bark on the right side of the path
narrow winding dirt trail covered with leaves and small debris
dense low vegetation and shrubs lining the left side of the path
scattered fallen branches and logs on the forest floor
dense overhead tree cover blocking the sky and creating darkness

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a dense forest at night, following a narrow dirt path illuminated by a flashlight. Tall trees flank both sides with thick underbrush, while fallen branches litter the ground. The environment remains consistently dark and enclosed throughout the clip, with no other characters or significant events occurring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a claustrophobic nocturnal forest that maintains a tense, unchanging atmosphere of isolation. It begins by tracking along a narrow dirt path, where a flashlight cuts through the oppressive darkness to reveal towering trees. As the camera advances, the beam sweeps across thick underbrush and fallen branches that litter the ground, emphasizing the density of the woods. The scene remains consistently enclosed and dark, steadily pushing deeper into the wilderness without interruption.
